input.background: The air quality data in Exercise 12.5 (Table 12.9) are associated with the summary statistics reported in Table 12.12.
input.question: Determine the two-sided $P$-value for testing $H_0: \mu_1=\mu_2$.

output.answer: $t_{\text{stat}}=\frac{36.25-36.00}{5.247}=0.05$. The one-sided $P$-value (by Table $C$ in the Appendix) is greater 0.25. Therefore, the two-tailed $P>0.50$. Using a software utility (www.cytel.com/Products/StaTable/), $P=0.96$. There is no significant difference in means.
